member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPlugin
member.summary: Defines the common interface for Prime's plugins.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk
member.summary: Interface for PrimeSDK Service Abstractions. Provides methods for managing DFF values, shared storage, ITUFF data, runtime variables, and more.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.Utilities
member.summary: Gets the Prime SDK utilities.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryGetDff(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Get DFF value.
member.returns: boolean indicating whether succeeded to retrieve dff, The DFF value associated with the token will be populated in the dffValue parameter.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.PrintToConsole(System.String)
member.summary: Prints a message to the console.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.PrintError(System.String)
member.summary: Prints an error message to the console.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.PrintDebug(System.String)
member.summary: Prints a debug message to the console.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryGetScUserVarValue(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Retrieves the value of a system configuration variable.
member.returns: Whether it succeeded to get the value of the variable.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.SetDff(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a DFF value for a given token.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.SetRuntimeVariable``1(System.String,``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets a runtime variable.
member.typeparam: The type of the runtime variable.
member.param: Indicates whether the variable should reset per die.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.SetRuntimeVariable(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets a runtime variable.
member.param: Indicates whether the variable should reset per die.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryGetRuntimeVariable``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Retrieves a runtime variable value.
member.typeparam: The type of the runtime variable.
member.returns: True if the runtime variable was successfully retrieved; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.AddQueriableItuffTokens(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Adds a set of queryable ITUFF tokens.
member.param: The set of tokens to add.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.WriteStringDataToItuff(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes string data to ITUFF with a specified postfix.
member.param: The postfix to append to the TNAME.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.WriteCommentDataToItuff(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes comment data to ITUFF with a specified postfix.
member.param: The postfix to append to the TNAME.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryReadFile(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the contents of a file.
member.returns: Whether it succeeded to read file or not.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.GetNormalizedFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Returns normalized full path of a relative file path provided - (starting from "." as first character, ~HDMT_TPL_DIR , user vars and). As well resolves @LATEST_REV@ dynamic token in the file path When @LATEST_REV@ token appears in the file path , Prime will determine the revision directory by looking for a file called latest.txt (in the path instead of @LATEST_REV@ token). It expects the first line of the file to contain the name (and not the full path) of the revision directory. Prime will not check if the directory in the latest.txt file actually exists. If the directory does not exist, it will fail later during the test program when it tries to access files in the directory. the below mechanism Example: PUP_DOWNLOADS_DIR = "I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\@LATEST_REV@" Prime will: 1. Replace @LATEST_REV@ token with latest.txt 2. Read the contents of I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\latest.txt (for example it will return 1000) 3. Resolve the directory path as - I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\1000.
member.param: Path to an existing local or remote file.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryGetFile(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve the contents of a file.
member.returns: True if the file exists; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.DoesCallbackExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a callback exists for a given name.
member.returns: True if the callback exists; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.RegisterCallback(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.param: The method information for the callback.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdk.TryGetItuffData(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Pulls the ITUFF Snippet for a specific Instance.
member.param: The Instance name for pull ITUFF data for.
The output data of specified tname.
member.returns: True if data exists, otherwise - failse. Also, data variable will be populated with The Ituff Snippet for the required instance.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdkUtilities
member.summary: Interface for Prime SDK utilities.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPrimeSdkUtilities.DeflateCompress32(System.String)
member.summary: Compresses a string using Deflate compression algorithm.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase
member.summary: This is a base class for a plugin.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase.PrimeSDK
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrimeSDK instance.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase.InputFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the input file path.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the plugin parameters.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase.CustomSetup
member.summary: Custom setup method for the plugin, this will be executed during the Init.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.MLPluginBase.ResolveParameters(System.String)
member.summary: This method resolves the parameters from the raw string input and populate them at this.Parameters property. it can be overridden by the plugin to implement custom logic for parameter resolution if user chooses to steam custom string and parse it by custom logic.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IMLModelPlugin
member.summary: Demo for plug in.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IMLModelPlugin.Setup(System.IServiceProvider,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Do something.
member.param: Raw paremeters, contains key and values. exmaple: [Parameter1=Value1|Parameter2=Value2].

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IMLModelPlugin.RunPrediction
member.summary: Do something.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPupModelPluginCallbacks
member.summary: Demo for plug in.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPupModelPluginCallbacks.GetExecutionMode(System.String)
member.summary: Checks which kind of execution mode is required for this unit.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPupModelPluginCallbacks.ExecuteEndFlowModel(System.String)
member.summary: Executes end flow model.
member.returns: true - if the plist if targeted , false - otherwise.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IPupModelPluginCallbacks.GetPupSetupData
member.summary: Gets the pup setup data.
member.returns: Returns the targeted plists and per model versions.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IVminNormalizerModelPluginCallbacks
member.summary: Demo for plug in.

member.name: M:PrimeSDKAbstraction.IVminNormalizerModelPluginCallbacks.NormalizeVoltage(PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters)
member.summary: Normalizes the voltage.

member.name: T:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters
member.summary: PluginVminNormalizeParameters.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.PowerDomainCornerFlow
member.summary: Gets or sets Domain.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance name.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.Temperatures
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dts list of values, needs to be as the number of cores.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.Vmins
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vmin to normalize.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.StepsForCurrentInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the steps for current instance.

member.name: P:PrimeSDKAbstraction.PluginVminNormalizeParameters.StepSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the Resolution of the steps.
